title: Thread Lock High Strength+Medium Strength, 100ml Locktight Threadlock Prevent Nuts, Bolts, Fasteners and Screws from Loosening Due to Prolonged Vibration, Thus Locking and Sealing Metal Nuts and Bolts
features: Lock Tight Thread Lock: Thread lock has anti-shock and vibration properties, can prevent nuts, bolts, bearings, fasteners and screws due to long-term vibration and loosening, rust and corrosion, so as to fix locking and sealing of metal nuts and screws, nuts and bolts locked together

High Strength and Medium Strength Difference: High strength, for permanent locking and sealing of threads up to M36; Medium strength, for locking and sealing of threads below M20; Attention: the use of locking agent, 1. Do not mix with metal, oil and dirt, 2. Pipe threads above Dn65 must be coated with adhesive on both sides, otherwise joint leakage may occur

Half-Bottle Package: Locktight threadlock agent in the anaerobic sealant is a one-component adhesive, exposed to air will remain in a liquid state, if in the absence of air conditions, curing will occur, so the product's will be sold in the form of half bottles (50ml), will not fill a whole bottle, to ensure that there is air in the bottle, to maintain the anaerobic adhesive is liquid state, easy to use

Use Steps: 1.Keep the surface clean, do not mix metal, oil debris, 2.Apply a sufficient amount of threadlocker agent at the end of the screw, 3.After applying the thread lock blue agent, tighten the nut to the locking agent position in 3 minutes by adjusting the angle, no further adjustments after curing, 4.Wait for 20 minutes for the initial curing, and 24 hours after the complete curing, which prevents loosening and rust and corrosion

Widely Used: Threadlock has high impact resistance, vibration resistance, temperature resistance and oil resistance. It can withstand low levels of oil contamination, and is suitable for use on all metal fasteners in automobiles, boats, hardware, and industrial machinery, avoiding the risk of costly and potentially injurious accidents caused by loosening of nuts, bolts, and screws in machinery, equipment, and vehicles
